basics.name: Hang Yang
basics.summary: PhD candidate in Mathematics at the University of Massachusetts Amherst. Researching machine learning, robotics, and deep learning — including mobile motion capture with robot dogs, invertible neural networks for image steganography, and vision transformers for medical AI.

publications.name: DKiS: Decay weight invertible image steganography with private key
publications.summary: Introduces a decay weight mechanism and private key integration into high-capacity invertible image steganography, ensuring secure access to hidden information requires a corresponding key.

publications.name: PRIS: Practical robust invertible network for image steganography
publications.summary: A practical robust invertible network for image steganography incorporating pre/post-enhancement modules and a gradient approximation function to handle rounding errors, achieving state-of-the-art robustness under multiple attacks.

publications.name: CovidViT: a novel neural network with self-attention mechanism to detect Covid-19 through X-ray images
publications.publisher: International Journal of Machine Learning and Cybernetics
publications.summary: Proposed Covid-Vision-Transformers (CovidViT) to detect Covid-19 cases through chest X-ray images using a self-attention mechanism.

teaching.institution: University of Massachusetts Amherst, Department of Mathematics and Statistics
teaching.description: Teaching assistant for multivariable calculus covering partial derivatives, multiple integrals, and vector calculus.

teaching.institution: University of Massachusetts Amherst, Department of Mathematics and Statistics
teaching.description: Teaching assistant for integral calculus covering integration techniques, series, and applications.

portfolio.name: Personal Website
portfolio.description: Built a personal website (yanghang.site) using Vue.js and Django.

portfolio.name: DQN with N-Steps
portfolio.description: Reproduced the DQN algorithm from 'Human-Level Control through Deep Reinforcement Learning' and extended it with an n-step return method, achieving improved performance.

portfolio.name: Game AI with Policy Gradient & Q-Table
portfolio.description: Designed and implemented automatic control for Airplane Wars and Tic-Tac-Toe games using Policy Gradient and Q-table methods.

portfolio.name: Automatic Figure Generation with GAN
portfolio.description: Implemented a Generative Adversarial Network for automatic figure generation trained on the MNIST dataset.

portfolio.name: Automatic Pathfinding Based on Neural Network
portfolio.description: Implemented an automatic pathfinding system using neural network-based methods.
